solutionFiles.content:
git init -b main
git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git add README.md pages/
git commit -m "Start neighborhood resource guide"
git status --short

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf resource-guide
mkdir -p resource-guide
cd resource-guide
printf %s '# Neighborhood Resource Guide
' > README.md
cd ..
cd resource-guide
mkdir -p pages
printf %s 'Help desk closes at 6 PM.
' > pages/contact.md
cd ..
cd resource-guide
mkdir -p pages
printf %s 'Welcome to the neighborhood guide.
' > pages/welcome.md
cd ..

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md pages/contact.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Start neighborhood resource guide' ] || fail "The latest commit message is not correct."

solutionFiles.content:
git add pages/services.md
git commit -m "Add local services page"
git status --short

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf resource-guide
mkdir -p resource-guide
git -C resource-guide init -q -b main
git -C resource-guide config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git -C resource-guide config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
cd resource-guide
printf %s '# Neighborhood Resource Guide
' > README.md
cd ..
cd resource-guide
mkdir -p pages
printf %s 'Help desk closes at 6 PM.
' > pages/contact.md
cd ..
cd resource-guide
mkdir -p pages
printf %s 'Welcome to the neighborhood guide.
' > pages/welcome.md
cd ..
git -C resource-guide add -A
git -C resource-guide commit -q -m 'Start neighborhood resource guide'
cd resource-guide
mkdir -p pages
printf %s '- Food pantry
- Health clinic
- Job center
' > pages/services.md
cd ..

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }

[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md pages/contact.md pages/services.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Add local services page' ] || fail "The latest commit message is not correct."

solutionFiles.content:
printf "generated/\n" > .gitignore
git add .gitignore
git check-ignore generated/preview.html
git diff --staged --name-only

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf resource-guide mkdir -p resource-guide git -C resource-guide init -q -b main git -C resource-guide config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner" git -C resource-guide config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local" cd resource-guide printf %s '# Neighborhood Resource Guide ' > README.md cd .. cd resource-guide mkdir -p pages printf %s 'Help desk closes at 6 PM. ' > pages/contact.md cd .. cd resource-guide mkdir -p pages printf %s 'Welcome to the neighborhood guide. ' > pages/welcome.md cd .. git -C resource-guide add -A git -C resource-guide commit -q -m 'Start neighborhood resource guide' cd resource-guide mkdir -p pages printf %s '- Food pantry - Health clinic - Job center ' > pages/services.md cd .. git -C resource-guide add -A git -C resource-guide commit -q -m 'Add local services page' cd resource-guide mkdir -p pages printf %s 'Help desk closes at 5 PM. ' > pages/contact.md cd .. git -C resource-guide add -A git -C resource-guide commit -q -m 'Update help desk hours' cd resource-guide mkdir -p generated printf %s '

Generated preview

' > generated/preview.html cd ..

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The exercise change is missing."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md pages/contact.md pages/services.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q generated/preview.html

' > pages/contact.md cd .. git -C resource-guide add -A git -C resource-guide commit -q -m 'Update help desk hours' cd resource-guide printf %s 'generated/ ' > .gitignore cd .. cd resource-guide mkdir -p generated printf %s '
